stories.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
stories.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the Secretary of the Navy is out of the role.

stories.title: The U.S. seizes another oil tanker as peace talks with Iran remain in limbo
stories.description: President Trump says he ordered the Navy to "shoot and kill any boat" putting mines in the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. ramps up minesweeping there.

stories.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
stories.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

stories.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
stories.description: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.

stories.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
stories.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

stories.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches
stories.description: Iran's chief negotiator says "violations" by the US and Israel make it impossible to open the strait.

stories.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
stories.description: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.

stories.title: Tracking ships under fire in the Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran's top negotiator says it's "not possible to reopen" the strait due to "blatent violations" of US-Iran ceasefire.

stories.title: US and Iran 'locked in war of words' says Lyse Doucet
stories.description: The US confirmed on Tuesday night that the Vice-President's trip to Pakistan for a second round of peace talks has been cancelled.

stories.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in Strait of Hormuz after vessels attacked
stories.description: One of the cargo ships was 'heavily damaged' by Iranian forces, a British maritime agency reported on Wednesday.

stories.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
stories.description: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

stories.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
stories.description: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

stories.title: Why and how is US blockading Iranian ports in Strait of Hormuz?
stories.description: Donald Trump says that the US is blockading the Strait of Hormuz. What does this mean in practice?

stories.title: Shadow of failed 1983 agreement haunts new Israeli-Lebanon talks
stories.description: As Lebanon prepares to resume direct discussions with Israel, the ghost of the May 17 Agreement of 1983 – a deal that was signed but never implemented – is haunting the new round of negotiations. President Joseph Aoun and Prime Minister Nawaf Salam are facing a smear campaign fro...

stories.title: EU approves massive loan to help Ukraine after Hungary lifts its veto
stories.description: The European Union on Thursday approved a massive loan package to help Ukraine meet its economic and military needs for the next two years, the bloc’s Cypriot presidency said, after Hungary lifted its veto. The EU also approved a new raft of sanctions against Russia over its war ...

stories.title: Lebanon to seek ceasefire extension in US-hosted talks with Israel
stories.description: The United States will host a second meeting between Lebanese and Israeli envoys on Thursday, with Beirut seeking the extension of a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah, a day after Israeli strikes killed at least five people including a journalist. The US-mediated ceasefire, ...

stories.title: War in Lebanon: Most people 'are severely traumatised', CARE country director says
stories.description: Lebanon's country director for the charity CARE has told FRANCE 24 that life for the Lebanese is a perpetual challenge that people have to overcome. Michael Adams says the ceasefire there is very fragile, and the constant infractions mean people don't have confidence in it. He to...

stories.title: Washington uses Iraq's own oil money to bend Baghdad to its will
stories.description: The Trump administration has blocked a shipment of nearly $500 million in cash to Iraq, pressing Baghdad to dismantle powerful Iranian-backed armed groups. Analysts say the blockage risks destabilising an already fragile economy.

stories.title: US-Israeli war on Iran will push 30 million back into poverty, UN warns
stories.description: Disruption to fuel and fertiliser supplies due to the Strait of Hormuz closure will hit crop yields, UNDP chief warns.

stories.title: Journalist recalls Israeli strike killing Amal Khalil in southern Lebanon
stories.description: Journalist Zainab Faraj recalled the final moments of fellow journalist Amal Khalil.

stories.title: Lebanon Latest: Israel attacks kill journalist and target first responders
stories.description: A fragile ceasefire holds as Israeli strikes kill a journalist and target first responders in Lebanon.

stories.title: US to ‘shoot and kill’ Iranian boats laying mines in Hormuz, Trump says
stories.description: US says it intercepted another tanker carrying Iranian oil as Trump underscores alleged infighting within Iran's leadership.

stories.title: How Iran war has triggered soaring cost of medicines
stories.description: Pharmacists in some countries have seen the cost of painkillers more than quadruple.

stories.title: Makan Nasiri, the only child still missing from the school bombed in Iran
stories.description: After nearly seven weeks of searching for remains, authorities tell the seven-year-old's parents his case is closed.

stories.title: Infiltration from Within: Israelis recruited to spy for enemy countries
stories.description: Israel’s intelligence exposed - spies, moles and blind spots from early betrayals to October 7 and the war with Iran.

stories.title: Protester hurls red fluid at Reza Pahlavi during Germany visit
stories.description: The exiled former crown prince of Iran Reza Pahlavi was splashed with red fluid by an activist during a visit to Berlin.

stories.title: Pakistan rejects Indian propaganda on Pahalgam attack, deplores 'weaponisation of false narrative'
stories.description: Pakistan rejected Indian propaganda linking it to the 2025 Pahalgam attack on Thursday, deploring that the neighbouring country was focusing on “weaponising its false narrative” in the midst on an ongoing regional crisis. The April 22, 2025 attack in Pahalgam saw 26 people, mostl...

stories.title: AI startup Cursor with Pakistani co-founder set for $60bn deal with SpaceX
stories.description: Cursor, an AI code-generation startup co-founded by Pakistani-born Sualeh Asif, has secured a $60 billion acquisition deal with Elon Musk’s SpaceX, according to multiple reports on Thursday. Along with OpenAI and Anthropic, Cursor is one of several Silicon Valley startups that ha...

stories.title: Israeli airstrike kills journalist in south Lebanon: civil defence
stories.description: An Israeli airstrike killed a Lebanese journalist and wounded another on Wednesday while they were working near the border with Israel, according to their employer and rescuers. The civil defence agency’s press office said rescuers were “able to recover the body of martyred journ...

stories.title: Lebanon, Israel to meet today as truce hangs by a thread
stories.description: • Envoys’ meeting in Washington aims to extend ceasefire, halt Israel’s demolitions• Beirut sees extension as first step to talks on forces’ withdrawal, return of detainees• Israeli strikes kill five in Lebanon, including a journalist WASHINGTON: Lebanese and Israeli envoys are s...

stories.title: Iran's economy looks set to withstand US naval blockade
stories.description: A US naval blockade of Iranian ports is likely to squeeze Iran’s oil output in the coming weeks but claims it will throw the Islamic republic into economic free fall remain premature, analysts say. After weeks of bombing and counter-strikes, focus has shifted to the standoff in t...

stories.title: US optimistic about Iran talks ‘this week’
stories.description: • Trump says resumption of negotiations in Islamabad possible within ‘36 to 72 hours’; appreciates Tehran for stopping ‘execution’ of detained women• Pezeshkian welcomes dialogue, cites ‘breach of commitments, blockade and threats’ as main obstacles• Trump denies media reports ab...

stories.title: Indian seafarer among crew of ship held by Iran in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Of two vessels in Iranian custody, one Indian is among the 21 crew onboard Epaminondas

stories.title: Israel-Iran LIVE: Trump orders U.S. Navy to 'shoot, kill' small boats laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran’s vow not to reopen the Strait of Hormuz so long as a U.S. naval blockade remained in place

stories.title: Trump orders U.S. military to 'shoot and kill' Iranian small boats choking Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Pentagon blasted as cherry picking and false a news report saying that the dept. assessed it could take six months to completely clear the Strait of Hormuz of Iranian-laid mines

stories.title: U.S. military says it seizes another oil tanker associated with Iran
stories.description: The seizure comes a day after Iran attacked three cargo ships in the strait, capturing two of them, in a move that intensified its assault on shipping in the key waterway through which 20% of the world's traded oil passes in peacetime.

stories.title: Reza Pahlavi splattered with red liquid in Berlin
stories.description: The son of Iran’s ousted shah called on Europeans to do more to support Iranian people; alleged perpetrator detained

stories.title: Pakistan Minister, U.S. envoy discuss efforts for 2nd round of U.S.-Iran talks
stories.description: The meeting comes amid stepped-up diplomatic engagements aimed at bringing Tehran and Washington to the negotiating table, possibly by the weekend
